hypothesis_en: Mr President, according to the agenda, we are finally proceeding, before the votes this morning, to the debate on the recommendation for the second reading on minimum safety requirements for tunnels in the trans-European road network, of which Mr Rack is the rapporteur.
reference_en: (3.01) pursuant to the agenda (1.54) before we have the vote though we have the debate ~oon the minimum safety requirements for tunnels in the Trans-European Road Network rapporteur Mr Rack I'd like to pass the floor firstly to the rapporteur Mr Rack (1.26)
source_es: (1.17) de acuerdo (1.23) con el orden del día procedemos finalmente antes de las votaciones de la mañana al debate de la recomendación para la segunda lectura relativa a requisitos mínimos de seguridad para túneles de la red transeuropea de carretera del que es ponente el Señor Rack tiene la palabra en primer lugar el ponente Señor Rack
